description: Black laptop bag with a top handle and adjustable shoulder straps Has a zippered pouch in front with a brand patch Has one zippered padded compartment Has one main compartment with a padded laptop compartment with a velcro closure, has a mobile pouch and two pen holder built into it, also has a mesh compartment built into the lining on opposite side Two legs at the base Warranty: 6 months warranty on fittings
